title: Vocaloid Music Discs
description: A mod that adds Vocaloid music discs
body:
![Vocaloids and music discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0eb7d29a4d56676f6a3a39bfbf45b54ae55282b4_0.webp)

This mod adds several new music discs with Vocaloid songs. Only available in NeoForge because it's made in MCreator.


<details>
<summary>Songs</summary>

(Sorry, I am not good at lists)
1. Triple Baka
2. Vulthoom
3. Automation
4. Magical Cure Love Shot
5. (unknown v flower x Len song)
6. Fukkireta
7. Kasane Territory
8. Bad Apple (not Vocaloid)
9. Teto the 31st
10. Candy Cookie Chocolate
11. Mesmerizer
12. More songs will be added soon! (Sorry some musics I forgot)

</details>
